meta.title: Process savings calculator — Industrial companies and distribution
meta.description: Calculate in 2 minutes how much money and time you are wasting on manual processes.For industrial, distribution and logistics companies.

sectionSolution.title: There is a solution
sectionSolution.subtitle: These are the problems we solve

sectionCta.title: Which of these is your case?
sectionCta.subtitle: Tell us.In two minutes we will tell you if we can help you.

sectionPainList.heading: Do any of these problems sound familiar?

quienes.title: Who we are
quienes.subtitle: Your partner to modernize operations without getting lost along the way
quienes.p1a: We want to be your partner in
quienes.p1b: : so you respond to what your users and clients already demand, and you make smart use of today's market technology — no fluff, no empty promises.
quienes.p2: Everything is going in the same direction: giving your brand, your company, and your day-to-day operations more strength. Win back hours lost to repetitive tasks, cut costs where you can, and, when you close the month,
quienes.p2em: leave more money on the table
quienes.p3a: If that resonates with you, we also want you to have
quienes.p3b: fewer headaches and more clarity to make decisions with confidence

footer.tagline: We optimize chaos to create clarity in your business.Clarity saves time and money

contact.dialog: How do you prefer to contact?

servicios.moreButton: Tell me more about this solution

chat.initial: Hi, I'm Kromi, the Kroomix assistant.In two minutes I will help you detect where there may be an opportunity for improvement in your operations.\n\nWhat is your name, what company are you from and what do you do?
chat.limitBody: With what you have told me we already have enough context.The next step is to speak directly.
chat.newThreadTitle: You have already used the {max} new conversations available
chat.errorGeneric: There has been an error.Please try again.
chat.hint: Shift + Enter for new line.The data you share is used only for this diagnosis.

chatCaso.l1: I have seen the case «{titulo}» on your website and I want you to explain this solution applied to my company well.
chatCaso.l4: If you don't already have context about me (name, company, what we do, and approximate team size), ask me first in a few questions.When you have it, develop the solution in detail and contextualized to our business.
